description: John Zenon is an employee deploying overseas and requires a pre-travel medical clearance. As the occupational health professional, complete the following clearance steps in GNU Health: 1) Add an active Condition/Disease using an ICD-10 code for prophylactic measures or administrative examination (e.g., Z29 or Z02.89). 2) Create a Clinical Evaluation documenting his pre-travel baseline vital signs (must include Systolic Blood Pressure, Diastolic Blood Pressure, and Heart Rate). 3) Record a travel vaccination in the Immunizations module (e.g., Yellow Fever, Typhoid; if a specific travel vaccine is not found in the demo database, select any available vaccine). 4) Create a Prescription for malaria chemoprophylaxis (e.g., Doxycycline, Mefloquine, or Chloroquine; use any available generic alternative if necessary). 5) Schedule a Follow-up Appointment between 10 and 20 days from today to verify vaccine tolerance and finalize the clearance. Save all records. Login: admin / gnusolidario at http://localhost:8000/.
